briefs.title: Proposed: Burnaby Five-Year Financial Plan Bylaw 2026–2030 Up for Council Approval
briefs.summary: Council is set to vote on a proposed bylaw that would set Burnaby's budget plan from 2026 to 2030, starting with roughly $873M in revenue and $1.35B in spending for 2026. Property taxes would remain the city's biggest revenue source, covering about 45% of costs, with businesses carrying 37% of the municipal property tax burden.
briefs.action_required: Review how the proposed 2026 property tax distribution affects your business class tax bill.
briefs.industries: Construction & Development, Landlord & Property Mgmt, Retail
